scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,cyan "sh -c 'if lsof -tiTCP:5082 -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null; then echo Backend already running on http://localhost:5082; echo Swagger available at http://localhost:5082/swagger; echo Frontend will run on http://localhost:5173; else dotnet run --project src/TaskManagement.Presentation --launch-profile http; fi'" "npm --prefix src/TaskManagement.Presentation/frontend run dev"
scripts.build: dotnet build && npm --prefix src/TaskManagement.Presentation/frontend run build
